ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the order was created */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the order was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped) */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., website, mobile app, phone call) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Primary address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first placed an order */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "email_opt_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has opted in for email communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Pending, Shipped) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is currently active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the status */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the status was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being referenced */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change occurred */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the order */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the status change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., Manager, Staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the employee (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_details" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "signature_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a signature is required upon delivery */,
  "insurance_value" REAL /* Value of the insurance for the shipment */,
  "return_label_provided" INTEGER /* Indicates if a return label was provided with the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_details" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., success, failed, pending) */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method (e.g., card type, last 4 digits of card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return shipment */,
  "return_received_date" TEXT /* Date the return was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the discount is applied to */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Amount) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code for the discount */,
  "applied_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who applied the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_applied_by FOREIGN KEY ("applied_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
